_note: CAPCO-2016 §H.3 p55 — US/non-US/JOINT classifications are mutually exclusive; SECRET//NS commingles US SECRET with NATO SECRET. Fires E012 dual-classification. Issue #677: NS (portion form for NATO SECRET) appears in a banner line; canonical banner is NATO SECRET (§G.1 Table 4 p36). Two diagnostics expected — orthogonal defects on the same span.
